name: ai-dev-control-center
description: Desktop app: AI controls dev workflow via local LLM and tools

scripts.build: tsc && cp desktop/preload.js dist/desktop/ && npm run build:ui
scripts.dev: tsc && concurrently "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on -t 60000 http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:3000 && echo 'Launching Electron...' && NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.pack: npm run version:bump && npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac
scripts.pack:mac: npm run version:bump && npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac
